shared_properties: The door occupies a 64x96 px footprint that matches the documented exit-door scale for floor completion.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while unlock tones stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Art deco ornament stays vertically symmetrical so the goal reads instantly at the far edge of a floor.
differences: Eight frames cover closed, unlocking, and open states with a central iris split and rising gold light seams.
The opening motion favors mechanical shutters and rune inlays rather than smoke effects so it fits the tower engineering aesthetic.
Final open frames expose a high-contrast void passage that can accept Umbra silhouette entry without clipping.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds exit-door dimensions, unlock condition, and floor-clear transition.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the gold mechanical flourish used for progress gates.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra-to-door scale so entry framing remains readable.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the exit-door atlas during FloorLoading and trigger atlas progression when the puzzle unlock condition resolves.
runtime_notes: Keep the center-bottom pivot stable across all frames for collision consistency.
Drive the unlock sequence as a non-looping one-shot at 12 fps.
Render the open-state void interior darker than the surrounding trim so Umbra entry remains readable.

context.usage: Goal object that opens after target scale conditions are met and then accepts player contact to finish the floor.

construction_notes: Usable opening height is at least 72 px in the final state.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x192 px with eight 64x96 frames arranged in a 4x2 layout.
Closed, unlocking, and open states are distinguishable at one glance without auxiliary UI text.
Final open state preserves a clear passage silhouette suitable for Umbra entry and floor-transition framing.
